description: Sock Snob - Ladies Festive Christmas Socks Christmas is coming, and you know what that means: it's time to start thinking about gifts for your loved ones. It's never easy to find the perfect present for the woman in your life, but we've got a great suggestion for you, our very own branded Sock Snob Ladies Festive Christmas Socks! They come in red, green, pink and cream colours so they'll go with any outfit. Each pair comes with a festive design which include: Candy Canes, Fairisle, Christmas Trees, Snowflakes, Xmas Puddings and Gingerbread Men. They're just waiting to keep your feet warm and comfy through every holiday party and family gathering. Made from cotton rich fibres, these socks are full of comfort and have a comfort top to keep them in place. These would make a great stocking filler and you can choose from a range of multipack options: 6 pairs, 12 pairs or 24 pairs - so you can get even more bang for your buck! We all love a little bit of Festive cheer at Christmas time, and these Women's Festive Christmas Socks from Sock Snob are the perfect way to add some festive colour to the wardrobe. Whether you are looking for Xmas socks for yourself to go with your Christmas jumper or for a family member you’ll be satisfied. These socks come in packs of 6, 12, or 24 Pairs, with many festive patterns per pack. They’re made from 51% Cotton 31% Nylon 16% Polyester 2% Elastane, are available in sizes 4-8 UK, 37-40 EU, 5-9 US and are machine washable. Extra Product Details Ladies Christmas Socks Sock Snob Branded Cotton Rich Fibres Multipack Options: 6, 12 or 24 Pairs 6 Festive Designs Per Pack Comfort Top Red, Green, Pink & Cream Colours A Perfect Xmas Gift Great Value For Money Women's One Size: 4-8 UK Machine Washable
